Flow.description: Generate the MACD button on the sales order to create the Add MACD or push the Move/Disposal to the MACD team
Flow.label: MACD - Generate MACD

fields.name: Accessories_Rollout_or_Full_Deployment
fields.fieldText: Are the accessories to be rolled out or a full deployment

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Accessory_Rollout_or_Deployment_Screen
screens.label: Copy 1 of Accessory Rollout or Deployment Screen

fields.name: Are_the_managed_services_to_be_rolled_out_or_a_full_deployment
fields.fieldText: Are the managed services to be rolled out or a full deployment

fields.name: Copy_1_of_quantityDisplayText
fields.fieldText: How many going out of {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Product2.Name} - Left to roll out: {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Remaining_to_Rollout__c}

validationRule.errorMessage: Quantity must be less than or equal to the remaining rollout quantity: {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Remaining_to_Rollout__c}

fields.name: Rollout_or_Full_Deployment
fields.fieldText: Are the assets to be rolled out or a full deployment

fields.name: quantityDisplayText
fields.fieldText: How many going out of {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Product2.Name} - Left to roll out: {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Remaining_to_Rollout__c}

validationRule.errorMessage: Quantity must be less than or equal to the remaining rollout quantity: {!Loop_Rollout_Rows.Remaining_to_Rollout__c}
